title: Databricks Excel Add-in requires workspace preview enablement
body: To use the Databricks Excel Add-in, a workspace admin must now enable the **Excel Connector** preview from the Previews page. See [Set up the Databricks Excel Add-in](/aws/en/integrations/excel-setup) and [Manage Databricks previews](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/manage-previews).

ref_links.text: Set up the Databricks Excel Add-in
